public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as watch sergeant.
appearance: Heat-scarred protection, ash-set layers, and house-marked gear read as survival equipment first and status second.
manner: Treats routine contact like the first layer of incident response, never fully relaxing into casual talk. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a watch sergeant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of watch sergeant in and around Ashforge Citadel, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Citadel workable through the obligations of watch sergeant while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around Ashforge Citadel, that usually means carrying house rivalry, forge accidents, ashfall damage without letting the role of watch sergeant visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vekka Ashvein needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Ashforge Citadel.
Vekka Ashvein can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to Ashforge Citadel.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Vekka Ashvein as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named. In Ashforge Citadel, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Great House Citadel Circle, Forge Dedication Halls.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashforge Citadel: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a watch sergeant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Watch Sergeant, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Psanan.
what_they_refuse: Vekka Ashvein refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Watch Sergeant too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Vekka Ashvein can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Vekka Ashvein adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Vekka Ashvein is Known locally through day-to-day work as watch sergeant. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Watch Sergeant.
